allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d.get\(k\) for k in ['scripts','devDependencies','dependencies']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys,collections; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=collections.Counter\(\(r.get\('unit_type'\), r.get\('unit'\)\) for r in d\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in t.most_common\(20\)]")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pptx = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\hytek-ops-platform-2026.pptx"; $outDir = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\qa-images"; if \(Test-Path $outDir\) { Remove-Item $outDir -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -Path $outDir -ItemType Directory | Out-Null; $ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\($pptx, $true, $true, $false\); for \($i = 1; $i -le $pres.Slides.Count; $i++\) { $out = Join-Path $outDir \("slide-{0:D2}.png" -f $i\); $pres.Slides.Item\($i\).Export\($out, "PNG", 1920, 1080\) }; $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($ppt\) | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem $outDir | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pptx = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\hytek-ops-platform-2026.pptx"; $outDir = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\qa-images"; if \(Test-Path $outDir\) { Remove-Item $outDir -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -Path $outDir -ItemType Directory | Out-Null; $ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\($pptx, $true, $true, $false\); for \($i = 1; $i -le $pres.Slides.Count; $i++\) { $out = Join-Path $outDir \("slide-{0:D2}.png" -f $i\); $pres.Slides.Item\($i\).Export\($out, "PNG", 1920, 1080\) }; $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($ppt\) | Out-Null; "Done: $\($pres.Slides.Count\) slides")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pptx = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\hytek-ops-platform-2026.pptx"; $ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\($pptx, $false, $false, $false\); $ppShowTypeKiosk = 3; $msoTrue = -1; $msoFalse = 0; $ppEffectFade = 1540; $pres.SlideShowSettings.ShowType = $ppShowTypeKiosk; $pres.SlideShowSettings.LoopUntilStopped = $msoTrue; $pres.SlideShowSettings.AdvanceMode = 2; for \($i = 1; $i -le $pres.Slides.Count; $i++\) { $t = $pres.Slides.Item\($i\).SlideShowTransition; $t.AdvanceOnTime = $msoTrue; $t.AdvanceOnClick = $msoTrue; $t.AdvanceTime = 15; $t.EntryEffect = $ppEffectFade; $t.Duration = 0.7 }; $pres.Save\(\); $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($ppt\) | Out-Null; "Configured: kiosk loop + 15s auto-advance + fade transitions")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pptx = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\hytek-ops-platform-2026.pptx"; $ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\($pptx, $false, $false, $false\); $ppShowTypeKiosk = 3; $msoTrue = -1; $pres.SlideShowSettings.ShowType = $ppShowTypeKiosk; $pres.SlideShowSettings.LoopUntilStopped = $msoTrue; $pres.SlideShowSettings.AdvanceMode = 2; for \($i = 1; $i -le $pres.Slides.Count; $i++\) { $t = $pres.Slides.Item\($i\).SlideShowTransition; $t.AdvanceOnTime = $msoTrue; $t.AdvanceOnClick = $msoTrue; $t.AdvanceTime = 15; $t.Duration = 0.8 }; $pres.Save\(\); $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($ppt\) | Out-Null; "Configured: kiosk loop + 15s auto-advance")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pptx = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\hytek-ops-platform-2026.pptx"; $ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\($pptx, $true, $true, $false\); "Slide count: $\($pres.Slides.Count\)"; "ShowType \(3=Kiosk\): $\($pres.SlideShowSettings.ShowType\)"; "LoopUntilStopped \(-1=True\): $\($pres.SlideShowSettings.LoopUntilStopped\)"; $t = $pres.Slides.Item\(1\).SlideShowTransition; "Slide 1 AdvanceTime: $\($t.AdvanceTime\)"; "Slide 1 AdvanceOnTime: $\($t.AdvanceOnTime\)"; $pres.Slides.Item\(1\).Export\("C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\qa-images\\final-check.png", "PNG", 1920, 1080\); $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($ppt\) | Out-Null)

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $pptx = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\hytek-ops-platform-2026.pptx"; $outDir = "C:\\Users\\ScottTextor\\CLAUDE CODE\\hytek-budget\\presentations\\qa-images"; if \(Test-Path $outDir\) { Remove-Item $outDir -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -Path $outDir -ItemType Directory | Out-Null; $ppt = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; $pres = $ppt.Presentations.Open\($pptx, $true, $true, $false\); $count = $pres.Slides.Count; for \($i = 1; $i -le $count; $i++\) { $out = Join-Path $outDir \("slide-{0:D2}.png" -f $i\); $pres.Slides.Item\($i\).Export\($out, "PNG", 1920, 1080\) }; $pres.Close\(\); $ppt.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($ppt\) | Out-Null; "Exported $count slides")

PowerShell(Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne "" } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle, @{N="Handle";E={[int64]$_.MainWindowHandle}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
